chat.content: Long research session — combined topics.
[CLAIM C1 status=active evidence=likely] dual-layer preserves anchors
[CLAIM C2 status=active evidence=untested] composite anchors fix collisions
[CLAIM C3 status=tentative evidence=unclear] short chats compress poorly
[CLAIM C4 status=active evidence=established] replay is bit-exact
[CLAIM C5 status=frozen evidence=established] core is byte-identical
[CONSTRAINT R1 scope=core] no core changes
[CONSTRAINT R2 scope=eval] no metric tuning after seeing results
[CONSTRAINT R3 scope=eval] ground truth is independent
[DECISION D1 since=t1] use Jaccard at 0.6
[DECISION D2 since=t2 replaces=D1] use Jaccard at 0.5 with neighbour-fp
[DECISION D3 since=t4] separate decide() from format_record()
[DECISION D4 since=t5] state must validate no-prose
[DISCARD X1] embedding-based dedup | reason: forbidden offline
[DISCARD X2] LLM-rationalized scoring | reason: non-deterministic
[DISCARD X3] auto-tune thresholds to labels | reason: violates pre-registration
[CONFLICT K1 claims=C2,C3 status=open]
[CONFLICT K2 claims=C1,C4 status=stalled]
[QUESTION Q1 blocking] how to size budget per session
[QUESTION Q2] do we generalize the auditor to multi-file docs
[EVIDENCE domain=compression status=likely]
[EVIDENCE domain=tests status=established]
[EVIDENCE domain=evaluation status=unclear]
Many sentences of off-topic conversation about coffee, fonts, the meeting on Friday, none of which is epistemic state and none of which should appear here.
